meaning: n.罗马教皇的三重冠,冠状头饰
examples: She wore a lovely tiara but the groom, not to be outdone, had on a very smart embroidered waistcoat.
Pick a veil and tiara that match the dress.
Her sister curled her hair and put in blond extensions and a sparkly tiara.
Fletke walked down the aisle with a wedding dress, a veil and a tiara.
The general public will be able to pose with the tiara daily from noon till 2 p.m.
